description: Codex hooks for the FlexNetOS meta workspace; mirrors the active .claude hook surface and enforces upgrade-preserving workspace discipline.

hooks.command: rtk bash -lc "d=${META_ROOT:-$PWD}; while [ \"$d\" != / ]; do [ -f \"$d/.meta.yaml\" ] || [ -f \"$d/.meta.yml\" ] || [ -f \"$d/.meta\" ] && break; d=$(dirname \"$d\"); done; [ \"$d\" != / ] || exit 0; exec \"$d/.codex/hooks/with-meta-env.sh\" \"$d/.codex/hooks/meta-context-session-start.sh\""
rtk bash -lc 'rtk git kb service status --quiet >/dev/null 2>/dev/null || rtk git kb service start >/dev/null 2>/dev/null'

rtk bash -lc "d=${META_ROOT:-$PWD}; while [ \"$d\" != / ]; do [ -f \"$d/.meta.yaml\" ] || [ -f \"$d/.meta.yml\" ] || [ -f \"$d/.meta\" ] && break; d=$(dirname \"$d\"); done; [ \"$d\" != / ] || exit 0; exec \"$d/.codex/hooks/with-meta-env.sh\" \"$d/agent/target/debug/agent\" guard"

rtk bash -lc "d=${META_ROOT:-$PWD}; while [ \"$d\" != / ]; do [ -f \"$d/.meta.yaml\" ] || [ -f \"$d/.meta.yml\" ] || [ -f \"$d/.meta\" ] && break; d=$(dirname \"$d\"); done; [ \"$d\" != / ] || exit 0; exec \"$d/.codex/hooks/with-meta-env.sh\" \"$d/agent/target/debug/agent\" codex stop"

rtk bash -lc "d=${META_ROOT:-$PWD}; while [ \"$d\" != / ]; do [ -f \"$d/.meta.yaml\" ] || [ -f \"$d/.meta.yml\" ] || [ -f \"$d/.meta\" ] && break; d=$(dirname \"$d\"); done; [ \"$d\" != / ] || exit 0; exec \"$d/.codex/hooks/with-meta-env.sh\" \"$d/agent/target/debug/agent\" codex stop"
